{"id":"smallhold-q7a","title":"Configure clippy lints, rustfmt, and cargo-deny","description":"Configure the project's code quality tooling. .clippy.toml with chosen lint levels. rustfmt.toml for formatting. deny.toml for cargo-deny (license policy, advisory DB, duplicate crate detection).

Agent workflow: Research common clippy lint sets for axum/tokio async projects. Spawn a subagent to enumerate all transitive licenses.

Test discipline: CI gate: clippy + fmt --check + deny must all pass before any other checks.

Defensive programming: Deny: arithmetic_overflow, integer_arithmetic clippy lints in production code paths. Allow in test modules with #[cfg(test)] exceptions.","acceptance_criteria":"cargo fmt --check passes; cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes; cargo deny check passes; .cargo/config.toml sets default target for dev builds","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:25:47Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:25:47Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-2o6","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:25:56Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
